channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Passenger And Cruise
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: Dubai
Description:

Multiple job vacancies are available across all departments on a cruise ship. This is an opportunity to join a large fleet operating in Dubai. Interested candidates are encouraged to apply via the provided link for further details on specific roles and requirements.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cruise Ship Job Vacancies - All Departments at Dream Cruises

item.description:
Location: Italy
Description:

A Steward position is available on RoRo Pax vessels for qualified personnel, with or without sea experience. Attractive salaries and contracts are offered for Italian-flagged vessels, including all benefits. Contact for more information.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Steward Job on RoRo Pax Vessel at Tinecomar Crewing Agency

item.description:
Location: Squamish, British Columbia
Description:

A Deckhand position is available on a passenger transfer vessel, requiring the SVMO-U qualification and previous experience on motor ships. Responsibilities include safe personnel transfer, emergency response, and maintaining vessel safety and environmental compliance. The role involves watchkeeping, maintenance, and record-keeping. This is a full-time, rotational contract position based in Squamish, British Columbia, with a daily rate range of $378.00 to $420.00.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Deckhand Job on Passenger Transfer Vessel at Bridgemans Services Group LP (BSG)

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Opportunities are available for various roles within guest services and hospitality on cruise ships. Interested candidates are invited to submit their CVs for consideration. This is a chance to build a career at sea within the cruise industry, focusing on guest experience and onboard services.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cruise Ship Jobs - Guest Services Hospitality Roles at World of Seamen Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Opportunities are available for crew members to join the Engine and Deck Departments on cruise ships. This role offers a chance to become part of a global team and travel the world. Candidates with relevant skills and a passion for a career at sea are encouraged to apply.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Crew Recruitment for MSC Cruises - Engine Deck at World of Seamen Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A cruise ship is seeking an Assistant Refrigeration Technician with experience in refrigeration and air conditioning systems. Knowledge of cooling equipment maintenance and repair is required. Previous maritime, hospitality, or industrial experience is advantageous. Strong English communication skills and a technical mindset are essential. STCW certificates are preferred.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Assistant Refrigeration Technician Job - Cruise Ship at World of Seamen Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An experienced Assistant Refrigeration Technician is sought to join the Engine Department on a modern cruise fleet. The role requires previous experience with refrigeration and HVAC systems, good English communication skills, and the ability to troubleshoot technical issues. Knowledge of refrigeration equipment, compressors, cooling systems, and preventive maintenance is essential for this international career at sea.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Assistant Refrigeration Technician Job - Cruise Ship at World of Seamen Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Motivated professionals are sought to join the international crew of a cruise ship. This role offers the chance for new experiences and a career at sea. Opportunities are available for various positions within the catering department.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Crew Jobs on MSC Cruise Ships at World of Seamen Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Crew members are sought for a cruise ship. This is an opportunity to join the maritime industry and experience a unique work environment. Further details regarding specific roles and requirements can be obtained by contacting the hiring agency.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Crew Vacancy on Cruise Ship at World of Seamen Group

item.description:
Location: worldwide
Description:

Energetic Water Park Cruise Staff are sought for MSC Cruises fleet worldwide. Responsibilities include supervising water park activities, ensuring guest safety, and creating a fun atmosphere. Previous experience with water slides or in amusement parks is preferred. Candidates must have good English skills. This role offers a unique working environment with ocean views.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Water Park Staff Job on MSC Cruises Ship at World of Seamen Group
